summary: Sprint 1D.2 Customer Domain Migration — full backend verification. 82 new tests in test_sprint1d2_customer_gate.py + 44 non-regression (1C/1D.1/1D.T) = 126 PASSED, 0 FAILED. Found and fixed 1 import bug introduced by the migration: app/customer/router.py was importing rebuild_customer_intelligence from `server` (no longer exposed there) — fixed to import from app.customer.service.
action_items: None — Sprint 1D.2 is verified GREEN. Main agent may merge.
critical_code_review_comments: router.py customer endpoint was importing rebuild_customer_intelligence from server.py — that function lives in app.customer.service now. Fixed (one-line import path).
seed_data_creation: All TEST_-prefixed docs (favorites, behavior_events, web_bookings, car_requests) auto-cleaned per test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_sprint1d2_customer_gate.py covers: (a) require_account_kind helper unit tests (5), (b) full coverage matrix anon/provider/admin/customer across 12 GET + 3 POST + 1 DELETE endpoints (54), (c) anonymous-friendly + public reads (5), (d) dual-write of customerAccountId in customer_favorites / customer_behavior_events / web_bookings / car_requests (5), (e) 403 message clarity (1), (f) non-regression smoke (7). DB fixture reads MONGO_URL/DB_NAME from /app/backend/.env via dotenv (env vars get mangled by xargs+quotes).
rca_of_issue: Bug: GET /api/customer/intelligence returned 500 ImportError. Root cause: router.py line 64 had `from server import rebuild_customer_intelligence`, but server.py no longer re-exports the function — it lives in app.customer.service. Fix: change import to `from app.customer.service import rebuild_customer_intelligence`. Verified: endpoint returns 200 for customer token after backend restart.

test_results.test_sprint1d2_customer_gate.py: 82 passed (incl. 5 helper, 54 matrix, 3 anon-friendly, 2 public reads, 5 dual-write, 1 message clarity, 12 non-regression)
